raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Gr: jemt / un mannam Wahrdam
&c. to Gōhdu doht / fakka tas
KUNGS Zebaot: Tad fuhti-
schu es to Lahstu juhtu Starpâ/
un | nolahdeschu juhfas Swehti-
khanas/ teescham / es nolahde-
schu to/ ka juhs to nofirschu ne
neimteet wehrâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "3. Reds/ es mattaschu jums
to Sehku/ un kaisischu Subdus
nhs juhseem Waigeim / juho
Swehtku Subdus/ ta ka juhs
ar teem tapfeet atneenti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "4. Tad juhs tajuttifeet/ ka es
to Banflihu pee juhs efimu fuh-
tijs/ ka manna Derriba ar Lew-
ja effoti/ fakka tas KUNGS
Zebaot.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "5. Manna Derriba ar winnu
bija par Dshwoschannu un par
Meern/ un es dewu winnam to
Bihjatchannu/ un winſch bihja-
jahs manni/ un winſch bailojahs
preekſch manna Wahrdâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "6. Ta Banfliha bija winna
Mutte/ un tahs Pateetibas Ne-
leetiba ne tappe winna Luhpâs
atraſta: Wiꞥſch staigaja ar man-
nin meertgi/ un pareiſi/ un at-
greese dauds no ta Noseeguma.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "7. Jo weena Preestera Luhp-
pahin buhs to Mahzibu fargabt/
un no winna Mutteſ buhs to
Banflihu mekleht/ jo wiꞥſch irr
weens Engelis ta KUNGA Ze-
baot.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Bet juhs eſat no ta Zelta
nogreesufchees/ juhs eſat dauds
eckſch tahs Banflihas daudsuaj-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "ichi/ juhs effeet Lewja Derr-
famaitajschi/ fakka tas KUN
Zebaot:
9. Tapehz efinu es juhs ar
dsan neewatus un nezeenig
Darrijs vreeksch wiffeem Laudi-
tapehz ka juhs mannus Zeltkus
turrat/ bet to Watgu uhsluh-
jat Bautlibâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "10. Neggi mums wiffeem
weenâ Tehws? Neggi wee-
weenigs Deews muhs irr ra-
dijs? Rapehz tad mehs to Ti-
bu pahrlausam/ un fagahnu-
weenâ starp ohtru to Derr-
muhfu Tehwu?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "11. Juhda pahrlausfa to D-
zibu/ un eekſch Israëta un
rusalemes tohp Negantiba
darrita. Jo Juhda fagahna
KUNGA Swehtibu / ko win-
mikto/ un irr weena five-
Deewa Mettu prezzejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "12. Tas KUNGS isdeld
to Wihru / kas fcho darra /
Jehkaba Dshwokta/ kas* M-
zitaji un Mahzekti irr / un
tas Ehdamo-Uppuri nefš t-
KUNGAM Zebaot.
* Eebr: Wall: Kas nomohdâ irr, um ka-
bild.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "13. Scho ohtru darrat i-
arrisan / ka juhs ta KUN-
Altari aplahjat ar Affarah-
ar Raudaschannas/ un ar Nop-
schannas/ ta ka winſch wairs-
Ehdamo-Uppuri ue wars-
dseht/ nedâ ar labbu Patif-
nu no juhsahm Robkahm u-
pretti xemt.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
